summary: Share consolidation proposed with a ratio of 1-for-3, subject to future implementation.
The Company may consider effecting a reverse stock split to regain compliance with minimum bid price requirements.
1-for-2 to 1-for-250 share consolidation proposed for a future effective date of March 20, 2026.
Proposals include share consolidations (reverse split) with a ratio of not less than 1-for-10 and not more than 1-for-500, to be determined by the board at an unspecified future date.
Authority granted for reverse stock splits with a ratio range of 1-for-2 to 1-for-199, effective date to be determined.
The Company may consider effecting a reverse stock split if necessary to regain compliance with Nasdaq listing requirements.
1-for-4000 reverse stock split approved with an effective date to be determined by the Board within two years.
